anti-slop:
BANNED language patterns — never use these: - "game-changer", "revolutionary", "groundbreaking" - "exciting times", "brave new world", "paradigm shift" - "it remains to be seen", "only time will tell" - "in a move that surprised nobody/everybody" - Passive voice where active works - Weasel words: "some say", "experts believe" (name the expert)
USE INSTEAD: - Specific numbers and dates - Named sources and quotes - Active verbs: built, shipped, broke, cut, raised - Concrete outcomes, not vague implications
